What it does for you

What actually changes
when you carry one

The card is small. What it does to the way a room reads you is not.

The one that changes the room

You become the person worth remembering, before you say a word

You tap a matte-black card and your whole profile lights up on their phone. That one move tells the room how you operate. People treat you the way you show up, and this is you showing up like you mean it.

Everything, in one tap

Your face, your story, your links, your work, a save-contact button. It all lands on their phone in a second, while the person beside you is still hunting for a pen.

You never run dry

Meet ten people or five hundred at the same event. The card is ready for every one, the next event, and the year after that.

Change anything, reprint nothing

New number, new title, new venture. You edit the page and the card already knows. A drawer full of paper cards cannot do that.

Works on the phone in their hand

Tap it on the back of any modern iPhone or Android. If a phone is shy, they scan the gold code. Either way, your profile opens.

How it works

Tap. Open. Remembered.

Nobody downloads anything, not you, not them. You build the page once, and one card carries it into every introduction after that.

1

Tap the card

Hold your Acecard to the back of any modern phone, or let them scan the gold code. Both work, every single time.

2

Your world opens

Their screen fills with you: your face, your story, your links, your work. The first impression does the talking.

3

They keep you

One press saves you to their contacts. One press keeps the conversation going long after the room clears out.

0 appsto install, on either side

Build your profile your way

Tap your own card to open the editor, then drag it into shape.

Tap to open your builder

Tap your own card to jump straight into the editor. Change a line, swap a link, and the card picks it up.

Drag and drop sections

Move your bio, gallery, and buttons by dragging them into place. Put what matters up top.

Upload photos and videos

Add a sharp profile photo, a cover, a gallery, and videos of your work. Your first impression does more.

Customise background

Pick your background, set the layout, and make the page look like you. It reads clean on any phone.

All your socials and links

Drop in Instagram, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, your website, whatever you run. A tap sends people there.

Before you tap

Questions worth asking

Does it tap on iPhone and Android?

Yes. It taps on modern iPhones and most Android phones, and NFC is on by default most of the time. If a phone won't tap, the gold QR always works.

Do I need an app?

No app at all, for you or for the person you meet. Your profile opens right in their phone's browser when they tap or scan.

Can I update my details later?

Yes, whenever you want. Edit your profile and the card stays the same. The next tap shows your latest details.

What if their phone does not tap?

They scan the gold QR on the card. It opens the same profile, so you have a backup that works on any phone with a camera.

Is it one card for everything?

Yes. You carry a single Acecard and it does every introduction you'll ever make. Tap it as often as you like.

How long does setup take?

A few minutes. Add your photo, bio, links and socials, then you're ready to tap. You can keep refining it later whenever you have time.
